questions.text: What is the primary frequency for completing the Asset Closing process?
During the Month-End Closing, what action is taken regarding Assets under Construction (AuC)?
options: They are settled to respective final assets if needed

questions.text: What happens to the planned depreciation during Month-End Closing?
options: It is posted directly to Financial Accounting
It is only recalculated but not posted
It is recalculated and posted using AFAB

questions.text: At the fiscal year change, how are the asset values from the previous year treated in the new fiscal year?
What happens in the NEO system during a fiscal year change?
options: The new fiscal year is automatically opened when you run the carry forward
The new fiscal year needs to be opened manually
The previous fiscal year must be reopened

questions.text: Which of the following statements is true about the sequence of year-end closings?
options: General Ledger closing must be done before Asset Accounting closing
Asset Accounting closing must be done before General Ledger closing
Both closings can be performed simultaneously

questions.text: Which reporting tool is associated with S/4 HANA for asset reporting?
With the introduction of WBS elements, the Invest flow now automatically creates AuC for better analysis.
What purpose does the additional report in Asset Accounting serve?
options: To compare depreciation across IFRS, LOCAL, and TAX ledgers

questions.text: Depreciation and recalculation processes should be performed for all ledgers including IFRS, local, and tax.
